runs.topic: How CRISPR Actually Edits DNA
runs.title: How CRISPR Actually Edits DNA
runs.description: Explain CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing for a general audience: guide RNA, Cas9 cut, repair. Note clinical use is carefully regulated and many applications remain experimental. Ground in Nobel-recognized CRISPR research (Doudna/Charpentier).
runs.thumbnail_concept: DNA helix with scissors metaphor, clean educational look

runs.topic: Your Brain Rewires Itself
runs.title: Your Brain Rewires Itself
runs.description: Explain neuroplasticity: synaptic strengthening, practice-driven change, limits of adult plasticity. Avoid miracle-brain claims. Ground in cognitive neuroscience consensus (Hebbian learning, skill acquisition studies).
runs.thumbnail_concept: neural network lighting up with practice

runs.topic: What JWST Sees That Hubble Can't
runs.title: What JWST Sees That Hubble Can't
runs.description: Explain infrared astronomy: JWST sees through dust and looks farther back in time than Hubble's optical view. Cite NASA/ESA/CSA JWST mission science. Avoid claiming it 'proved' contested theories — stick to what infrared imaging enables.
runs.thumbnail_concept: JWST golden mirrors vs deep-field galaxies

runs.topic: Why Sleep Locks In Your Memories
runs.title: Why Sleep Locks In Your Memories
runs.description: Explain sleep-dependent memory consolidation: slow-wave and REM roles at a high level. Avoid overclaiming exact mechanisms still under study. Ground in sleep neuroscience reviews.
runs.thumbnail_concept: sleeping brain sorting glowing memory files

runs.topic: Quantum Entanglement in Plain English
runs.title: Quantum Entanglement in Plain English
runs.description: Explain entanglement without mysticism: correlated quantum states, measurement, no faster-than-light messaging. Mention Bell tests as experimental confirmation. State clearly that entanglement does not enable FTL communication.
runs.thumbnail_concept: two linked particles, clean diagram aesthetic

runs.topic: Life Without Sunlight at Deep Sea Vents
runs.title: Life Without Sunlight at Deep Sea Vents
runs.description: Explain hydrothermal vent ecosystems and chemosynthesis. Cite NOAA/WHOI-style oceanography. Avoid overstating 'origin of life' certainty — present as a leading hypothesis area, not settled fact.
runs.thumbnail_concept: black smoker vent with glowing tube worms

runs.topic: The Gut-Brain Axis Explained
runs.title: The Gut-Brain Axis Explained
runs.description: Explain the gut-brain axis: vagus nerve, microbial metabolites, mood research. Mark microbiome-mood claims as emerging where evidence is preliminary. Ground in NIH/peer-reviewed gastroenterology and neuroscience reviews.
runs.thumbnail_concept: gut and brain connected by glowing pathway

runs.topic: How We Photographed a Black Hole
runs.title: How We Photographed a Black Hole
runs.description: Explain Event Horizon Telescope: Earth-sized interferometry, M87* image, photon ring / shadow concept. Cite EHT Collaboration papers. Avoid sci-fi claims.
runs.thumbnail_concept: orange ring black hole image style educational

runs.topic: The Placebo Effect Is Real Biology
runs.title: The Placebo Effect Is Real Biology
runs.description: Explain placebo as measurable psychobiology: expectation, endogenous opioids, context. Not 'all in your head' dismissively. Ground in clinical research reviews.

runs.topic: How Octopuses Change Color Instantly
runs.title: How Octopuses Change Color Instantly
runs.description: Explain chromatophores, iridophores, papillae for texture. Ground in marine biology literature. Distinct from prior 'octopus intelligence' short.

runs.topic: How mRNA Vaccines Teach Your Cells
runs.title: How mRNA Vaccines Teach Your Cells
runs.description: Explain mRNA vaccine mechanism: lipid nanoparticle delivery, temporary protein instructions, immune recognition. Clarify mRNA does not integrate into DNA. Ground in peer-reviewed immunology and CDC/NIH educational materials.
runs.thumbnail_concept: cell receiving temporary message, not DNA rewrite

runs.topic: How Tardigrades Survive the Impossible
runs.title: How Tardigrades Survive the Impossible
runs.description: Explain cryptobiosis / tun state and extreme tolerance. Cite peer-reviewed tardigrade physiology. Avoid claiming they are immortal.
runs.thumbnail_concept: tardigrade in tun state vs space

runs.topic: Why Antibiotics Stop Working
runs.title: Why Antibiotics Stop Working
runs.description: Explain antibiotic resistance: selection pressure, gene transfer, stewardship. Cite CDC/WHO framing. No fearmongering — accurate public-health education.

runs.topic: Photosynthesis Is a Solar Power Plant
runs.title: Photosynthesis Is a Solar Power Plant
runs.description: Explain light reactions and carbon fixation simply: photons, chlorophyll, sugars, oxygen. Accurate chemistry without overload. Ground in standard plant physiology.

runs.topic: How AI Models Predict the Next Word
runs.title: How AI Models Predict the Next Word
runs.description: Explain transformers at a high level: tokens, attention, next-token prediction. Avoid AGI hype. Clarify limitations and hallucination risk. Educational AI literacy.

runs.topic: Earth's Crust Is Moving Under You
runs.title: Earth's Crust Is Moving Under You
runs.description: Explain plate tectonics: lithosphere plates, mid-ocean ridges, subduction, earthquakes/volcanoes. Ground in USGS geoscience education.

runs.topic: Why Fusion Energy Is So Hard
runs.title: Why Fusion Energy Is So Hard
runs.description: Explain confinement challenge: temperature, pressure, net energy gain. Mention recent net-gain experiments as milestones, not commercial readiness. Ground in DOE/ITER educational framing.

runs.topic: Why Physicists Think Dark Matter Exists
runs.title: Why Physicists Think Dark Matter Exists
runs.description: Explain rotation curves and gravitational evidence for dark matter. Clarify it is inferred, not directly detected. Mention alternatives exist but dark matter remains leading model. No conspiracy framing.

runs.topic: How Bees Tell Each Other Where Food Is
runs.title: How Bees Tell Each Other Where Food Is
runs.description: Explain the waggle dance: angle relative to sun, duration for distance. Cite classic ethology (von Frisch) and modern confirmations.

runs.topic: How LIGO Hears Colliding Black Holes
runs.title: How LIGO Hears Colliding Black Holes
runs.description: Explain gravitational waves and laser interferometry detection. Cite LIGO/Virgo GW150914 as first detection. Accurate, non-sensational.

runs.topic: Why Coral Reefs Turn White
runs.title: Why Coral Reefs Turn White
runs.description: Explain coral-zooxanthellae symbiosis and bleaching under heat stress. Cite NOAA coral reef science. Note recovery is possible but repeated stress raises mortality.

runs.topic: Your Attention Is a Limited Battery
runs.title: Your Attention Is a Limited Battery
runs.description: Explain selective attention and cognitive load simply. Avoid viral 'goldfish attention span' myth. Ground in cognitive psychology.

runs.topic: Epigenetics: Switches on Your Genes
runs.title: Epigenetics: Switches on Your Genes
runs.description: Explain epigenetics simply: methylation, histone marks, environment influence. Avoid Lamarckian overclaims and 'trauma permanently rewrites DNA' sensationalism. Mark inheritance claims carefully as an active research area.

runs.topic: What Perseverance Is Hunting on Mars
runs.title: What Perseverance Is Hunting on Mars
runs.description: Explain Jezero crater science goals: past habitability, sample caching for return. Cite NASA Mars 2020. Do not claim life has been found.

runs.topic: How Robots Learn by Trial and Error
runs.title: How Robots Learn by Trial and Error
runs.description: Explain reinforcement learning for robotics at a high level: trial, reward, policy. Note sim-to-real gaps. Avoid claiming human-level robot general intelligence.
runs.thumbnail_concept: robot arm learning a task with reward signals

runs.topic: Ancient DNA Is Rewriting Human History
runs.title: Ancient DNA Is Rewriting Human History
runs.description: Explain aDNA methods and how they inform migration/admixture models. Note uncertainty and revision as samples grow. Ground in population genetics / archaeology consensus without overclaiming single-study narratives.

runs.topic: Does Water Have Memory? Science Says No
runs.title: Does Water Have Memory? Science Says No
runs.description: Debunk water memory / homeopathy molecular memory claims with chemistry: hydrogen bond lifetimes are fleeting; dilution past Avogadro leaves no solute. Educational myth-busting grounded in physical chemistry.
runs.thumbnail_concept: water drop with myth vs molecule

runs.topic: The Ozone Hole Is Healing
runs.title: The Ozone Hole Is Healing
runs.description: Explain CFC damage, Montreal Protocol, and observed recovery trends from NOAA/NASA/UN assessments. Accurate hopeful science without claiming the problem is fully gone.

runs.topic: Base Editing: CRISPR Without the Double Cut
runs.title: Base Editing: CRISPR Without the Double Cut
runs.description: Explain base editing vs classic CRISPR cut-and-repair. Note it is still largely in research/clinical trial stages. Ground in Liu lab / Nature reviews style accuracy.

runs.topic: Do Mirror Neurons Explain Empathy?
runs.title: Do Mirror Neurons Explain Empathy?
runs.description: Explain mirror neuron findings and the debate: useful for action understanding, but empathy is not fully explained by them alone. Present scientific uncertainty honestly. Ground in cognitive neuroscience reviews.
